About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long Today's data reveals exceptional long-term momentum in energy sector stocks, with **VLO ranking #1** and **MPC** close behind, both displaying extraordinary 10-year returns (VLO: 373.5%, MPC: 658.1%) and passing all five momentum ratio thresholds. VLO shows the most balanced outperformance versus SPY across all timeframes (79% over 1y, 138% over 5y), while MPC demonstrates more extreme acceleration, particularly in the 5-to-10 year ratio at 4.78x. Both stocks are trading above all major moving averages with strong technical positioning, though MPC's 10-year outperformance versus SPY (406.5%) significantly exceeds VLO's (121.89%), suggesting MPC may represent a more extreme secular trend play. The high correlation between both stocks and XLE (0.74 for VLO) indicates this momentum is sector-driven rather than idiosyncratic, reflecting multi-year energy sector strength.
